node.description: Sirzechs Lucifer, formerly known as Sirzechs Gremory, is the older brother of Rias Gremory. Known as the Crimson Satan, he is the leader of the Four Great Satans who rule the Underworld with the title of "Lucifer". He is also the husband of Grayfia Lucifuge and father of their son, Millicas Gremory.  (Source: High School DxD Wikia)

Riser's Queen and the strongest member of his peerage, also known as the "Bomb Queen" (爆弾王妃（ボム・クイーン） Bomu Kuīn) due to her powerful fire magic that looks like a bomb explosion when hitting the target.   ~!She defeated Koneko, Akeno (albeit with the use of the Phoenix Tears), and Yuto at the Rating Game between Rias and Riser. She is Riser's favorite piece, as he often makes out with her and fondles her.!~ (Source: Wikipedia)

Riser's Pawn. As a show of power, Riser had her hurt Issei for insulting him and added insult to injury by commenting that despite Mira being his weakest piece, she was able to easily beat Issei.   ~!She later fights Issei again at their masters' Rating Game, where she became one of the first victims of Issei's Dress Break before being completely taken out of the game by Akeno.!~ (Source: Wikipedia)

Member of Kuoh Academy's Girls' Kendō Club. She and Murayama are often subjected to Issei, Matsuda, and Motohama's lecherous peeping, in which they and the rest of the club retaliate by beating them with their shinai.

The third son of the Phenex house, one of the respected families in Hell. He was suppose to marry Rias in an arranged marriage between the Gremory and Phenex family but Issei disagreed and challenged him to a battle. Issei got beaten in one hit by one of his Pawns.  Rias then agreed to have a Rating Game with Raiser to settle the matter of the marriage and get revenge for attacking Issei.   ~!He defeated Rias in the Rating Game by beating up Issei until Rias surrendered. He was then beaten by Issei in the wedding ceremony using a combination of his Balance Breaker and using the Boosted Gear to amplify the effects of holy water and a cross which he brought with him. !~

Riser's Rook. A woman who wears a mask on the right side of her face. She was incapacitated by Issei's Dress Break before being defeated by Issei's Dragon Shot. Unlike Karlamine, she considers honor to be fulfilling Riser's wishes by any means necessary and fair play optional. She reappears in Volume 5 as Ravel's escort during the Young Devils Gathering.  (Source: Wikipedia)
Riser's Pawns. Twin catgirls who specialize in hand-to-hand combat. Defeated by Issei and Yuto.  (Source: Wikipedia)
Riser's Knight. Wields a giant broadsword that can cause strong winds such as shock waves.   ~!She was defeated by the combination attack of Issei and Yuto.!~ (Source: Wikipedia)
Riser's Bishop. Wears a Kimono. Defeated by Issei and Yuto.

Her identity was The Fallen Angel, Raynare. The villain who plotted to seduce and than kill Issei using the name, Yuuma Amano, and stole Asia's Sacred Gear, Twilight Healing. Unfortunately, Issei survived and was resurrected as a low-level demon.  

~!A few episodes later, Yuuma was beaten by Issei.!~

Matsuda is one of Issei's best friends who made up the "Perverted Trio" (変態三人組 Hentai San'nin-gumi), a trio of the biggest perverts at the Academy, and is a self-proclaimed lolicon. Matsuda's nicknames are "Perverted Baldy" (エロ坊主 Ero-bōzu) and "Sexual Harassment Papparazzi (セクハラパパラッチ Sekuhara Paparatchi). Matsuda is a former jock and school sports star. He and Motohama are jealous of Issei's relationship with the Occult Research Club, and constantly spreads bad rumors about Issei, such as Issei being a sadist who blackmailed Rias and Akeno into doing sexual acts. He does not know that Issei and the Occult Research Club members are Devils.  (Source: High School DxD Wiki)

He first appeared in volume 2 of the novel.    ~!Also known as the Welsh Dragon or the Sekiryutei (Red Dragon Emperor). One of the Two Heavenly Dragons along with the Vanishing Dragon Albion. The two dragons, with powers rivaling to gods, started fighting a long time ago for reasons even Ddraig forgot.   At that time, the angels, devils and fallen angels were waging a war against each other. The 3 factions believed that the fight the two dragons were having could spell disaster to the whole world so they set aside their war to stop the fight and seal the two dragons.   He now resides inside Issei's Sacred Gear as a result of being sealed in it. !~

She first introduced herself as Sirzechs' maid. She was the one who relayed the Gremory family's request to have Rias participate in a Rating game against Raiser.   ~!She is in truth Sirzechs's Queen, both in the Evil Pieces and as the Maou's wife.!~

Motohama (元浜) is the other best friend of Issei who made up the "Perverted Trio". Motohama has the ability to calculate a female's body measurements just by looking, which earned him nicknames such as "Perverted Glasses" (エロメガネ Ero-megane) and "Three Sizes Scouter" (スリーサイズスカウター Surī Saizu Sukautā). Like Matsuda, he constantly spreads bad rumors about Issei out of jealousy of his relationship with the Occult Research Club. He does not know that Issei and the Occult Research Club members are Devils. Motohama is known to have better results than both Issei and Matsuda.  (Source: High School DxD Wiki)
The student council president of Kuoh Academy, and one of the two top-class devils in the school along with Rias.
